dependencyVerdicts.label: Core web runtime and private egress
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev1 if patient intake and staff queue unavailable together

dependencyVerdicts.label: NHS login and identity handoff
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 if sign-in unavailable; sev1 if unauthenticated safe intake also unavailable

dependencyVerdicts.label: Notification and secure message provider
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 if outbound patient comms degraded for more than 30 minutes

dependencyVerdicts.label: Local booking provider adapter
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 if slot offer or appointment confirmation truth unavailable

dependencyVerdicts.label: Pharmacy EPS and provider directory
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 in pharmacy wave; observe-only for core web Wave 1

dependencyVerdicts.label: NHS App embedded channel
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: not launch critical while Wave 1 scope excludes NHS App

dependencyVerdicts.label: Monitoring and alerting destination
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev1 if clinical safety alerts cannot reach owner rota

dependencyVerdicts.label: Backup target and restore report channel
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev1 if restore cannot prove tenant-bound report publication

dependencyVerdicts.label: Document and export object store
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 if artifacts unavailable; sev1 if private object exposure suspected

dependencyVerdicts.label: Assurance analytics destination
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev2 if readiness proof cannot be published

dependencyVerdicts.label: Supplier support and service desk routes
dependencyVerdicts.incidentSeverityMapping: sev1 when supplier route blocks patient-affecting incident containment

serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Runtime rollback and failover remain bounded to Wave 1 tenant cohort.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: supplier published support with internal identity owner rota
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: internal identity owner covers safe-mode routing; supplier OOH by status channel
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Signed-in journeys can pause while unauthenticated safe intake remains available.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: business-hours supplier plus support OOH practice route
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: local support duty manager routes urgent patient contact only
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Manual contact volume ceiling is enforced and audited.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: business-hours supplier; local OOH workaround only
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: no direct supplier OOH support path; local duty manager can activate manual log
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Manual appointment log must reconcile before patient-facing confirmation.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: observe-only for Wave 1; supplier route required before pharmacy wave
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Core web can launch because pharmacy dispatch is excluded from Wave 1.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: deferred channel; monthly data and service management protocol pending
serviceLevelBindings.businessHours: NHS App integration manager route when channel active
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: NHS App channel remains excluded while core web and staff launch scope proceeds.

serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: duty incident commander plus alert owner rota
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Manual watch bridge is activated only with named owner acknowledgement.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: 24x7 restore owner with report publisher route
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: resilience owner and restore report owner both callable
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Restore is not authoritative until report publication is current and tenant-bound.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: 24x7 storage operations with records owner approval
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: storage on-call routes suspected exposure to incident commander
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Export pause is safer than reissuing artifacts without redacted grants.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: business-hours analytics owner with local evidence freeze fallback
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: evidence freeze can run locally; analytics replay waits for owner
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: No launch action reads analytics as authority while destination is degraded.

serviceLevelBindings.supportWindow: named primary and OOH supplier escalation contacts
serviceLevelBindings.outOfHours: OOH route must validate role, phone ref, and email ref before activation
serviceLevelBindings.assumption: Supplier contact freshness blocks launch-critical incident fallback.

edgeCaseProofs.description: Dependency is ready in business hours but has no out-of-hours supplier path.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: direct supplier OOH is missing; local duty workaround must own OOH activation

edgeCaseProofs.description: NHS App channel remains deferred while core web can launch.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: channel route frozen; launch scope excludes NHS App

edgeCaseProofs.description: Pharmacy provider fails but manual prescription/communication path is untested.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: manual pharmacy communication has no rehearsal evidence for patient referrals

edgeCaseProofs.description: Monitoring destination configured but alert owner rota is missing.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: clinical safety alert destination cannot prove accountable owner acknowledgement

edgeCaseProofs.description: Backup target ready but restore report channel is absent.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: restore cannot become authoritative without WORM-published restore report

edgeCaseProofs.description: Supplier contact exists but role, phone, or email reference is expired or unverified.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: supplier route cannot support a launch-critical incident with stale contact evidence

edgeCaseProofs.description: Manual fallback solves workflow but violates privacy or retention controls.
edgeCaseProofs.failClosedReason: manual contact route must not move raw PHI into supplier tickets or unretained logs
